---
title: "Analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
---

### **Key Takeaways**

-   **20-Year Historical Scope:** This study analyzes the quantitative relationship between the USD/TRY exchange rate and Borsa Istanbul (BIST) indices across a 20-year span (2006–2026).
-   **The Regime-Dependent Banking Pivot:** The Banking sector (`XBANK.IS`) exhibits strong regime-dependent behavior, outperforming during stable regimes and lagging during high volatility.
-   **Structural Break & Equity Hedge (2021–2026):** Despite a massive currency depreciation, BIST indices served as a robust hedge, yielding positive USD returns.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# **Detailed Graphical Analysis**

Aşağıdaki başlıklar yan menüden (TOC) takip edilebilir. Her periyot için kümülatif büyüme, volatilite ve dolar bazlı performans grafikleri yer almaktadır.

## **Period 1: 2006 - 2010 Analysis**

<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik1.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik2.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik3.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik4.jpeg" width="100%"/>

## **Period 2: 2011 - 2015 Analysis**

<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik5.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik6.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik7.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik8.jpeg" width="100%"/>

## **Period 3: 2016 - 2020 Analysis**

<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik9.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik10.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik11.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik12.jpeg" width="100%"/>

## **Period 4: 2021 - Present Analysis**

<img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik13.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik14.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik15.jpeg" width="100%"/> <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/emu-hacettepe-analytics/emu430-fall2024-team-r-a-beni-lutfen/124ea0b01e459faf8931b2e927e05da9a08005df/docs/grafik16.jpeg" width="100%"/>
